violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fronts of cooler doors. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors under equipment.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside 4 door prep cooler.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fronts and handles on 4 door prep cooler.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -3 compartment sink faucet is broken and dripping needs repair.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need more thorough cleaning.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Wet mop sitting on floor.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
